name: 02_fuzzy_asr_variance
description: The overlap region is the same words but Whisper produced slightly different ASR for it the second time around (typical ~1 char per 50 char drift). Our fuzzy threshold of <=2 mismatches per 50 chars must catch this.
prev: Caesar crossed the Rubicon in forty nine BC, ending the Republic.
next: in forty-nine BC ending the Republic. Then the Empire began.
expected: Caesar crossed the Rubicon in forty nine BC, ending the Republic. Then the Empire began.
